successStories.story1Quote: VIETconsult didn't just help me find a job, but helped me feel at home in Germany. The support was consistently professional and personal.

partner.pageSubtitle: Our Strategic Partner for Training and Development

intro.title: talentsCARE - Your Partner for Professional Development
intro.description: talentsCARE is our strategic partner for continuous training and development of your Vietnamese professionals. Together we offer a comprehensive portfolio of training courses and seminars.

collaboration.title: Our Collaboration
collaboration.description: Through our close partnership with talentsCARE, we can not only provide you with qualified professionals, but also ensure their continuous development. This guarantees long-term success and satisfaction on both sides.

cta.title: Learn More About talentsCARE
cta.description: Visit our partner's website for detailed information about the complete range of services.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: VIETconsult is your reliable partner for recruiting and integrating qualified professionals from Vietnam. Since 2015, we connect Vietnamese talents with German companies and create sustainable success stories.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We build bridges between cultures and enable successful careers. Our goal is to connect German companies with highly qualified Vietnamese professionals while ensuring sustainable, long-term integration.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where talents are borderless and everyone has the opportunity to reach their full potential – regardless of origin or location.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What Drives Us
values.value1Description: We take responsibility for fair and transparent processes
values.value2Description: Highest standards in recruitment and support
values.value3Description: Long-term partnerships instead of short-term solutions
values.value4Description: Honesty and trust in all business relationships

whyVietnam.title: Why Vietnam?
whyVietnam.subtitle: A Country Full of Talents and Potential
whyVietnam.reason2: Strong work ethic and willingness to learn
whyVietnam.reason5: Demographic advantage with young average age
whyVietnam.reason6: Close cooperation between Vietnam and Germany

teamGallery.title: Our Team in Action
teamGallery.subtitle: Insights into our work and collaboration

advantages.pageSubtitle: Why VIETconsult is the right partner for you

intro.title: What Sets Us Apart
intro.description: With VIETconsult, you get more than just recruitment services. We offer you a comprehensive service focused on long-term success.

benefits.title: Our Core Advantages
benefits.subtitle: What you can expect from us
benefits.benefit1Description: We handle the entire recruitment process – from candidate search to integration. You can focus on your core business.
benefits.benefit2Description: Through our own infrastructure in Vietnam and years of experience, we offer you optimal value for money with no hidden costs.
benefits.benefit3Description: All processes comply with German and international standards. We guarantee complete compliance and transparent documentation.
benefits.benefit4Description: Through comprehensive preparation and long-term support, we ensure high employee retention and satisfaction on both sides.
benefits.benefit5Description: Our candidates are specifically prepared for the German labor market in Vietnam – professionally, linguistically, and culturally.
benefits.benefit6Description: A dedicated contact person accompanies you through the entire process and is available even after placement.

promise.title: Our Promise to You
promise.description: We are only satisfied when you are. That's why we continue to support you and your new employees even after successful placement, ensuring sustainable and successful collaboration.

qualitySeal.pageSubtitle: Ethical Recruitment According to International Standards

intro.title: What is the KDA Quality Seal?
intro.description: The KDA Quality Seal stands for fair and ethical recruitment of international professionals. As a certified company, we commit to the highest standards in recruitment and guarantee transparent, legally compliant processes.

standards.title: Our Commitments
standards.subtitle: According to International Standards
standards.standard1Description: Ethical recruitment of health professionals according to WHO guidelines
standards.standard2Description: Compliance with the core labor standards of the International Labour Organization
standards.standard3Description: Respect for human rights in all business processes
standards.standard4Description: No hidden costs, fair contract conditions for all parties involved
standards.standard5Description: Regular review and continuous improvement of our processes
standards.standard6Description: Accessible and transparent system for conflict resolution

compliance.title: Legally Compliant Processes
compliance.description: All our recruitment processes comply with German and international regulations. We guarantee complete compliance and transparently document every step for all parties involved.

complaint.title: Complaint Management
complaint.description: As a KDA-certified company, we have a structured complaint procedure. Candidates and clients can contact us at any time.

services.pageSubtitle: Comprehensive Support from A to Z

intro.title: 4 Steps to Successful Integration
intro.description: From the initial candidate search to long-term support in Germany – we accompany you through the entire process and ensure successful integration.

recruitment.title: Recruitment & Selection
recruitment.subtitle: Targeted candidate search and professional selection of qualified professionals in Vietnam according to your individual requirements
recruitment.description: Targeted candidate search and professional selection of qualified professionals in Vietnam

step1.title: Needs Analysis & Requirements Profile
step1.description: We analyze your requirements in detail, create a precise competency profile, and jointly define the ideal candidate criteria for your company.

step2.title: Candidate Search in Vietnam
step2.description: Through our established network and local presence in Vietnam, we specifically identify suitable candidates via universities, vocational schools, and partner institutions.

step3.title: Professional Screening & Assessment
step3.description: Multi-stage selection processes with technical tests, language assessments, psychological aptitude tests, and structured interviews ensure highest quality.

step4.title: Presentation & Matching
step4.description: You receive detailed candidate profiles with all relevant qualifications, conduct personal interviews, and make the final selection decision.

features.title: Your Recruitment Advantages
features.subtitle: Quality and efficiency in every step

feature1.title: Local Expertise in Vietnam
feature1.description: Own offices in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi with experienced recruitment team on-site for direct access to top talents.

feature2.title: Comprehensive Candidate Screening
feature2.description: Multi-stage selection processes with technical, linguistic, and personal aptitude tests guarantee highest quality.

feature3.title: Industry Specialization
feature3.description: Expertise in nursing, medicine, technology, industry, and IT with industry-specific recruitment strategies and networks.

feature4.title: Transparent Process
feature4.description: Complete documentation, regular updates, and full transparency about all recruitment steps.

feature5.title: Legally Compliant Placement
feature5.description: All processes comply with German and international standards, KDA-certified according to ethical recruitment guidelines.

feature6.title: Time Savings & Efficiency
feature6.description: We handle the entire recruitment process and present you only pre-qualified top candidates.

cta.title: Ready for qualified professionals?
cta.subtitle: Start your individual recruitment process with VIETconsult now and benefit from our many years of expertise.

languageTraining.title: Language & Cultural Training
languageTraining.subtitle: Intensive preparation in our own language school in Vietnam with comprehensive cultural training for successful integration
languageTraining.description: Intensive preparation in our own language school with cultural training

step1.title: Assessment & Individual Learning Plan
step1.description: Detailed language level analysis and creation of a customized curriculum based on existing knowledge, learning pace, and professional requirements.

step2.title: Intensive Language Training (A1-B2)
step2.description: Structured German courses in our own language school with experienced native speakers, modern teaching methods, and small learning groups for optimal progress.

step3.title: Technical Language Training & Career Preparation
step3.description: Industry-specific vocabulary, technical terminology, and practice-oriented communication for nursing, technology, or IT, plus preparation for telc and Goethe certificates.

step4.title: Cultural Integration & Soft Skills
step4.description: Intercultural competence, German work culture, business etiquette, regional specifics, and practical everyday situations for successful integration.

feature1.title: Own Language Schools in Vietnam
feature1.description: Modern facilities in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi with qualified teachers, digital learning tools, and optimal learning environment.

feature2.title: Native Speaker Teachers
feature2.description: Experienced German teachers with DaF/DaZ qualifications and intercultural competence for authentic language learning.

feature3.title: Industry-Specific Courses
feature3.description: Specialized programs for nursing, medicine, technology, IT, and industry with relevant technical vocabulary and practical focus.

feature4.title: Certified Qualifications
feature4.description: Preparation and execution of official language exams (telc, Goethe Institute) for recognized certificates.

feature5.title: Cultural Preparation
feature5.description: Comprehensive training on German culture, work environment, social norms, and everyday situations.

feature6.title: Flexible Learning Models
feature6.description: Full-time, part-time, and online courses adapted to individual needs and schedules with blended learning concepts.

cta.title: Invest in successful integration
cta.subtitle: Well-prepared professionals are more productive, satisfied, and stay longer. Our language programs are the key to success.

recognition.title: Recognition
recognition.subtitle: Professional support for professional recognition and qualification in Germany for all regulated professions
recognition.description: Support with professional recognition and qualification in Germany

process.title: The Recognition Process
process.subtitle: Step by step to full recognition

step1.title: Document Review & Consultation
step1.description: Analysis of all foreign qualifications, examination of recognizability, identification of responsible authorities, and development of an individual recognition strategy.

step2.title: Application & Authority Communication
step2.description: Complete compilation of all required documents, professional translations, certifications, and submission to the responsible recognition bodies.

step3.title: Deficit Compensation & Qualification
step3.description: Organization of adaptation courses, knowledge tests, or aptitude tests to close identified qualification gaps.

step4.title: Full Recognition & Professional License
step4.description: Accompaniment until full recognition, obtaining professional license, and registration with professional chambers for unrestricted practice.

feature1.title: Comprehensive Consultation
feature1.description: Individual analysis of your qualifications with detailed assessment of recognition chances and transparent process flow.

feature2.title: Authority Expertise
feature2.description: Many years of experience with German recognition bodies, established contacts, and knowledge of all procedural paths for efficient processing.

feature3.title: Complete Documentation
feature3.description: Professional preparation of all documents, certified translations, certifications, and complete documentation.

feature4.title: Qualification Measures
feature4.description: Organization of adaptation courses, preparatory courses for knowledge tests, and placement with suitable education providers.

feature5.title: Specialization in Regulated Professions
feature5.description: Expertise in nursing, medicine, engineering, and other regulated professions with specific recognition procedures.

feature6.title: Timely Processing
feature6.description: Proactive monitoring of the recognition process, quick response to inquiries, and minimization of processing time.

cta.title: Full recognition for your professionals
cta.subtitle: We know all requirements and processes. Let us together ensure the professional recognition of your candidates.

relocation.title: Relocation & Integration
relocation.subtitle: Comprehensive support for arrival, housing search, and long-term integration in the company and in Germany
relocation.description: Assistance with arrival and long-term integration in the company

process.title: Our Integration Process
process.subtitle: Well cared for from day one

step1.title: Visa & Entry Management
step1.description: Complete support with visa applications, appointment scheduling, document preparation, entry formalities, and airport pickup in Germany.

step2.title: Relocation & Housing Search
step2.description: Finding suitable accommodation, negotiating with landlords, rental contracts, service relocation, and assistance with registration at authorities.

step3.title: Onboarding in the Company
step3.description: Accompanying the first working days, induction, cultural sensitization of the team, and regular feedback meetings.

step4.title: Long-term Support & Conflict Resolution
step4.description: Regular contact, support in everyday situations, cultural mediation, and professional conflict resolution for sustainable integration.

feature1.title: Arrival Support
feature1.description: Complete support with visa procedures, transport, airport pickup, and initial orientation in Germany.

feature2.title: Housing Services
feature2.description: Assistance with housing search, negotiating with landlords, rental contracts, and temporary transitional solutions when needed.

feature3.title: Company Onboarding
feature3.description: Accompanying the first working days, induction, cultural sensitization of the team, and regular feedback meetings.

feature4.title: Cultural Integration
feature4.description: Networking with Vietnamese community, local leisure activities, cultural events, and social integration for long-term well-being.

feature5.title: Family Reunification
feature5.description: Support with family reunification, kindergarten and school placement search, integration of the entire family for stable living situation.

feature6.title: Conflict Management
feature6.description: Professional mediation in challenges, cultural misunderstandings, or professional conflicts for sustainable solutions.

cta.title: Sustainable integration guarantees success
cta.subtitle: Well-integrated professionals are more motivated, productive, and stay longer. Invest in professional support.

content.title: Liability for Content
content.description: The contents of our pages have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 para.1 TMG under general laws.

links.title: Liability for Links
links.description: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.description: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. The reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

dispute.title: Consumer Dispute Resolution
dispute.description: We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

datenschutz.pageSubtitle: Information on the handling of personal data

intro.title: Privacy at VIETconsult
intro.description: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of legal regulations (GDPR, TKG 2003). In this privacy policy, we inform you about the most important aspects of data processing on our website.

automatic.title: Automatic Data Collection
automatic.description: When you visit our website, information of a general nature is automatically collected. This information (server log files) includes the type of web browser, the operating system used, the domain name of your Internet service provider and similar. This is exclusively information that does not allow any conclusions to be drawn about your person.

forms.title: Contact Form
forms.description: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.gdpr6_1b: Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR - Contract Fulfillment
legalBasis.gdpr6_1f: Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR - Legitimate Interests
legalBasis.description: The processing of personal data is based on the above-mentioned legal bases.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.description: You generally have the rights to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation and objection. If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law or your data protection claims have been violated in any other way, you can complain to the supervisory authority.
rights: Right to information about your stored data
Right to correction of incorrect data
Right to deletion of your data
Right of revocation of consent given
Right to complain to the supervisory authority

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: Our website uses cookies. Cookies are small text files that are stored in the Internet browser or by the Internet browser on a user's computer system. When a user visits a website, a cookie can be stored on the user's operating system.

types.title: Types of Cookies
types.session: Session cookies - temporary, deleted after browser closure
types.persistent: Persistent cookies - remain stored across multiple visits
types.analytics: Analytics cookies - to improve our offering

cookies.control: You can set your browser to inform you about the setting of cookies and decide individually about their acceptance or exclude the acceptance of cookies for certain cases or in general.

ssl.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
ssl.description: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, this site uses SSL/TLS encryption. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the browser's address line changing from 'http://' to 'https://' and by the lock symbol in your browser line.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.description: Our website uses various third-party services. Each service is subject to its own privacy policies:

matomo.title: Matomo (formerly Piwik)
matomo.description: This website uses Matomo, an open-source software for statistical evaluation of visitor access. Matomo uses cookies. The information generated by the cookie about your use of this website is stored on our server. Your IP address is anonymized immediately after processing and before storage.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: If you would like to receive the newsletter offered on the website, we require an email address from you as well as information that allows us to verify that you are the owner of the specified email address and agree to receive the newsletter.
newsletter.unsubscribe: You can revoke your consent at any time. A link to unsubscribe can be found in each newsletter.

retention.title: Storage Duration
retention.description: We store personal data only for as long as is necessary to fulfill the respective purpose or legal retention periods exist. After the purpose or expiration of the deadlines, the corresponding data is routinely deleted.

contact.title: Contact Data Protection Officer
contact.description: If you have any questions about data protection, you can contact us at any time:

changes.title: Changes to the Privacy Policy
changes.description: We reserve the right to occasionally adjust this privacy policy so that it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services. Your next visit will then be subject to the new privacy policy.

intro.title: Working at VIETconsult
intro.description: At VIETconsult, we work daily to bring people from different cultures together and enable successful international careers. Join our dedicated team and help us shape the future of international skilled worker recruitment.

whyUs.title: Why VIETconsult?
reasons: International work environment with locations in Germany and Vietnam
Meaningful work with real social impact
Flat hierarchies and short decision-making processes
Flexible working hours and home office options
Modern work environment and digital tools

list.title: Recruiter - Focus Vietnam
list.description: You are responsible for recruiting skilled workers from Vietnam. Ideally you speak Vietnamese and have experience in international recruiting.

list.title: HR Manager International
list.location: Frankfurt am Main / Ho Chi Minh City
list.description: Coordination and management of our international HR processes between Germany and Vietnam. Very good German and English skills required.

list.title: German Language Trainer
list.description: Teach German to Vietnamese skilled workers in our own language school in Vietnam. DaF certificate advantageous.

list.title: Client Consultant Healthcare
list.description: Advising German care facilities in recruiting nursing professionals from Vietnam. Experience in healthcare desirable.

list.title: Flexible Hours
list.description: Work-life balance through flexible working time models
